metadata.title: Chụp bầu trong studio phong cách tối giản lowkey
metadata.description: Concept bầu sexy nhẹ nhàng với voan

content:
Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference.

IMPORTANT: Keep the EXACT same face and identity. Do not stylize or alter the face.

CONCEPT: Soft, peaceful, emotional motherhood portrait.

BACKGROUND: Minimal black/dark gray studio, smooth gradient, empty and clean.

OUTFIT: A translucent, lightweight chiffon drape softly wraps around her body, creating subtle, elegant folds. It modestly covers parts of her legs, with the extended fabric flowing and curling around her before cascading onto the floor, adding a graceful, artistic touch.

POSE & FRAMING: Kneeling on the floor with legs folded to one side, torso upright, one hand gently holding the belly, the other resting near chest or shoulder, serene downward gaze, calm and tender emotion.

LIGHTING & STYLE: Soft window-like light, smooth shadows, fine-art maternity photography, monochrome black and white, shallow depth of field, photorealistic skin texture, 4K resolution. Spot light on hair.

Add a small handwritten-style watermark that reads ‘Prompt by: anph21’. Use a beautiful cursive font, thin strokes, low opacity, placed at the bottom right. Don’t change the face of reference image
